explanation: Speed = S, 9 = IX. S exceeded by IX = SIX. Youngster = TEEN. SIXTEEN, is 4x4.
hints: "Exceeded by" tells us to put one part "beyond" another.
How can we represent 9 in the form of a couple of letters?
The definition is 4x4, but not a four wheel drive, perhaps.
Speed can be represented by the letter S.
